# Company Users

Operations related to company users. Companies capture media for their customers. Company users represent photographers, videographers, administrators, and other staff.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/company-team-members` | List company team members. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/company-team-members/{company_team_member_id}` | Get company team member. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/company-team-members/{company_team_member_id}/events` | List company team member events. | Bearer token required |
